pages.text: If your pack carries $(o)Oh The Biomes We've Gone$(), your $(item)Forest$() seed already knows a new trick. Throw it over one of BWG's exotic wood biomes and the island grows in $(bold)that$() biome's trees instead of plain oak.

$(bold)Grow one$()$(br)Stand over a biome like $(o)aspen boreal$(), $(o)maple taiga$(), $(o)cika woods$() or $(o)sakura grove$() and throw a $(item)Forest$() seed — up comes an aspen, maple, cika, or cherry-blossom island. Eleven wood families answer the Forest seed today: aspen, baobab, cika, jacaranda, maple, ebony, redwood, zelkova, witch-hazel, sakura, and ironwood.

$(bold)Keep it forever$()$(br)Chop one tree for its $(item)sapling$(), then replant it anywhere — on any island or in a $(item)Botany Pot$(). One trip to a biome is all it takes to farm its wood for good; the map becomes your lumberyard.
$(bold)No BWG?$()$(br)No harm done — without the mod these biomes simply never come up, and the Forest seed grows its usual vanilla woods. This page is just here for when they do.
